vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely inaccurate regarding the current biological state of the specimens. P1 (String of Nickels) is absent/bare soil. P2 (Mexican Mint) is absent/bare soil. P3 (Pothos) is present but struggling. P4 (Silver Guest) is absent.

inventory_reconciliation.New_Introductions: Eggshell fragments (calcium amendment/debris) in P3 pot; unidentified electronic component (multi-pin header) on desk surface.

plant_audit.P1: Pot is empty; soil appears undisturbed and dry.
plant_audit.P2: Pot is empty; soil appears undisturbed and dry.
plant_audit.P3: Single leaf specimen remains. Shows signs of chlorosis and potential dehydration. Stem is thin.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Dry, dark, and compacted in all pots.
biome_observations.desk_surface: Contains a small electronic component (header pin) and paper debris.

temporal_deltas.T-5_to_T-4: Introduction of a small electronic component on the desk surface.
temporal_deltas.T-4_to_T-3: No significant biological change; component remains.
temporal_deltas.T-2_to_T-1: Lighting restored; P3 leaf appears slightly more desiccated.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_CURRENT: Stability in the state of the single P3 leaf; no further growth or decay observed.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of severe decline. P1, P2, and P4 are effectively dead or lost. P3 is the sole survivor, exhibiting signs of extreme stress, likely due to lack of nutrients or improper moisture levels. The presence of eggshells suggests an attempt at soil amendment, but it has not halted the decline.
anomalies: Total loss of P1, P2, and P4
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical environment is currently failing. Of the four registered plants, only one Pothos leaf remains in P3. The soil in all pots is dry and devoid of active growth. The presence of non-botanical debris (eggshells, electronic parts) suggests a disorganized maintenance environment. The Pothos is at high risk of total systemic failure.
